channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bernie and AOC to join El-Sayed as Democratic infighting moves to Michigan
item.description: Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez will rally for Abdul El-Sayed as AIPAC spends nearly $15 million backing his rival Haley Stevens.

item.title: Conservatives rally behind SAVE America Act after Trump declassifies 'shocking' election intel
item.description: Trump announced declassification of intelligence revealing election vulnerabilities and urged all Americans to demand the SAVE Act's passage.

item.title: Blanche meets with Epstein accusers after demand by GOP senator
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche met Thursday with accusers of convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein following the demand by a Republican senator...

item.title: Forecaster shifts California House seat to Democrats
item.description: Sabato's Crystal Ball on Thursday shifted California's 22nd Congressional District from Toss-up to Leans Democratic after certified primary results sh...
